parameters.content:
## Webinar Recording to Notion Knowledge Base Builder — WayinVideo + GPT-4o-mini + Notion + Sheets

For teams, educators, consultants, and agencies who run or attend webinars and want to build a searchable knowledge base without manually watching recordings or taking notes. Paste any webinar, training, or lecture recording URL via the form. WayinVideo transcribes the full session with speaker labels and timestamps. GPT-4o-mini reads the transcript and identifies 3 to 8 distinct topics covered — then for each topic writes a complete structured knowledge page with summary, key insights, action items, notable quotes, timestamps, and tags. One Notion page is created per topic. Every created page is also logged to Google Sheets with the Notion page URL for easy team access.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Webinar URL + Details** collects the recording URL, webinar title, speaker name, topic category, date, and target team
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** submits the URL for speaker-labeled transcription
- **3. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API longer initial processing time for webinar-length recordings
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** polls for the task result
- **5. IF — Transcription Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Format Transcript** formats each segment with speaker labels and timestamps
- **8. AI Agent — Extract Knowledge Topics** uses GPT-4o-mini to extract 3–8 topics as a JSON array — each with summary, key insights, action items, notable quotes, timestamps, and tags
- **10. Code — Parse Topics and Build Notion Content** parses the JSON array, adds webinar metadata, builds markdown content per topic, and returns one item per topic
- **11. Notion — Create Topic Page** creates one Notion page per topic with full structured content
- **12. Google Sheets — Log Created Pages** logs each page with the Notion page ID and URL

## Set up steps
1. In **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** and **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** — replace YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. Notion — Create Topic Page** — connect your Notion OAuth credential and set the parent database ID
4. In **12. Google Sheets — Log Created Pages** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_LOG_ID
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named Knowledge Base Log with columns: Webinar Title, Topic Title, Speaker, Topic Category, Webinar Date, Notion Page ID, Notion Page URL, Tags, Created On, Status

## Form Input
User submits webinar URL, title, speaker name, topic category, date, and optional target team. All fields feed into the transcript formatter and AI prompt.

## WayinVideo Transcription Submit and Poll
Submits the webinar URL for speaker-labeled transcription. Waits 90 seconds for initial processing — longer than short videos. Polls the results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Transcription Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to transcript formatting. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until the transcript is ready.

nodes.name: Section — Transcript Formatting and AI Knowledge Extraction

parameters.content:
## Transcript Formatting and AI Knowledge Extraction
Formats transcript with speaker labels and timestamps. GPT-4o-mini identifies 3–8 distinct topics and returns a JSON array — each topic includes summary, key insights, action items, notable quotes, timestamps, and tags.

nodes.name: Section — Topic Parsing, Notion Creation, and Sheet Logging

parameters.content:
## Topic Parsing, Notion Page Creation, and Sheet Logging
Parses the JSON array and returns one item per topic with full markdown content. Notion creates one page per topic. Google Sheets logs every created page with the Notion URL for easy team access.

e.g. Marketing Team, Sales Team, All Staff

parameters.formDescription: Paste your webinar or training recording URL. AI will transcribe the full session and automatically build a structured knowledge base in Notion — one page per topic covered.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert knowledge manager who specializes in extracting structured knowledge from webinar and training transcripts.

Your job is to read this webinar transcript and extract the key topics covered — then for each topic, write a detailed structured knowledge page ready to save in Notion.

---

## WEBINAR DETAILS
- Webinar Title: {{ $json.webinarTitle }}
- Speaker / Presenter: {{ $json.speakerName }}
- Topic Category: {{ $json.topicCategory }}
- Date: {{ $json.webinarDate }}
- Duration: {{ $json.totalMinutes }} minutes
- Target Team: {{ $json.targetTeam }}
- Recording URL: {{ $json.videoUrl }}

---

## YOUR TASK
1. First identify all the distinct topics covered in the webinar (minimum 3, maximum 8 topics)
2. For each topic, write a complete structured knowledge page
3. Base EVERYTHING only on what was actually said in the transcript — no invented content

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return a valid JSON array only — no text before or after, no markdown backticks.

Each item in the array represents one topic page:

[
  {
    "topic_title": "Short clear topic title (5-8 words)",
    "topic_summary": "2-3 sentence summary of what was covered on this topic. Write in plain English. No jargon.",
    "key_insights": [
      "First key insight from the transcript on this topic — one sentence each",
      "Second key insight",
      "Third key insight",
      "Fourth key insight (if applicable)",
      "Fifth key insight (if applicable)"
    ],
    "action_items": [
      "First specific action item or recommendation mentioned by the speaker",
      "Second action item",
      "Third action item (if mentioned)"
    ],
    "notable_quotes": [
      "Exact or near-exact quote from the speaker that best captures this topic"
    ],
    "timestamps": "Approximate time range where this topic was discussed — e.g. 5:00 - 15:30",
    "tags": ["tag1", "tag2", "tag3"]
  }
]

---

## RULES
- Return ONLY the JSON array — nothing else
- Do not invent content — extract only from transcript
- Keep key_insights short and actionable — one clear idea per insight
- Keep action_items practical — what should someone DO after watching this
- Tags should be 2-4 lowercase single words relevant to the topic
- If a notable quote cannot be found for a topic, use an empty array []

Now read the transcript and return the JSON array:

nodes.name: 10. Code — Parse Topics and Build Notion Content
